description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.reason: Migrating to the latest LTS versions (Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4) ensures long-term support, improved performance, enhanced security, and access to modern language features. Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and Spring Framework 6.x, which also mandates the migration from javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces. Update all related dependencies to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4 and Java 21.
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded the project to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4. Updated pom.xml with Spring Boot 3.4.4 (Spring Framework 6.x), Java 21, and ojdbc11. Migrated javax.persistence.* and javax.validation.* to jakarta.* namespaces in Photo.java. Build and all unit tests pass.
